name: South Miami Heights Trash and Recycling Center
hours: Miami-Dade lists neighborhood trash and recycling centers as Wednesday through Sunday, 9:00 AM to 5:30 PM. Confirm before visiting.
fees: Many neighborhood center services are resident-focused and may be free for eligible Miami-Dade residents. Confirm current limits and ID rules before arrival.
rules: Use the official county page to confirm resident eligibility, load prep, and current item limits before driving.
